secretaryOfState.agency: North Dakota Secretary of State - Business Services

physicalAddresses.label: Office of the Secretary of State

renewals.notes: Most North Dakota business registrations and maintenance filings, including annual reports, are completed through the FirstStop Portal. Business LLC annual reports are due November 15; fee $50.

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Registration fee for domestic and foreign business LLCs is $135 (SOS LLC page).
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: Name reservation is filed through the FirstStop Portal and reserves a name for up to 1 year; the reservation fee is $10 (ND SOS FirstStop, verified 2026-07-23).
